name: Task Manager Pro
description: A native macOS system utility for monitoring CPU, memory, processes, thermal state, and fans, with safe process controls and in-app updates.

name: FetchLater
description: A cross-platform desktop download manager for scheduling downloads, tracking progress, validating links, retrying failures, and installing updates.

name: PiNetMonitor
description: A lightweight internet usage monitoring system for Raspberry Pi and Orange Pi gateway deployments, with SQLite reports and a local web dashboard.

name: justQuit
description: A small native macOS menu bar app that closes regular apps while skipping menu bar and background apps, with protected apps, profiles, countdowns, and update checks.

name: justQuit Windows
description: A native Windows tray app for quitting selected regular apps, protecting important apps, saving profiles, restoring sessions, and using a global hotkey.

name: WinSwitch
description: A Windows app switcher that brings macOS-like fullscreen swipe behavior to keyboard shortcuts and mapped touchpad gestures.
